# Neverwinter Command Guide

Neverwinter Command Guide is a searchable reference website for Neverwinter slash commands, chat commands, whispers, alliance and party tools, emotes, utility commands, screenshots, display controls, combat logs, aliases, and copy-ready examples.

## Primary use cases

- Find a Neverwinter command by syntax, title, alias, category, or use case.
- Learn how a command works before copying it.
- Browse chat, private-message, guild, alliance, party, emote, utility, display, screenshot, and combat-log commands.
- Open dedicated static pages for individual commands.
- Browse category landing pages for related commands.

## Main routes

- `/` — Homepage and command-guide overview.
- `/commands` — Searchable command archive.
- `/categories` — Command categories.
- `/emotes` — Neverwinter emote commands.
- `/utility` — Utility and technical commands.
- `/about` — Project information.
- `/commands/[slug]` — Static command detail pages with syntax, explanation, examples, aliases, and category context.

## Technical summary

- Next.js 15 App Router.
- React 19.
- Static generation for command detail pages.
- Dynamic sitemap and robots output.
- Route-level metadata and canonical URLs.
- Open Graph and Twitter preview images.
- Search-first command dataset stored in `lib/commands-data.js`.

## Repository

https://github.com/Nischhalsubba/neverwinter-command-guide

## Accuracy note

Neverwinter commands can change or become undocumented after game updates. Commands should be verified before being presented as current or officially supported.

## Disclaimer

This is an independent fan-made reference and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Cryptic Studios, Arc Games, Gearbox Publishing, or the Neverwinter rights holders.
